description_long: This is a vintage-style chair with a padded seat and backrest, both upholstered in a mottled tan or light brown faux leather or vinyl material. The seat and backrest are slightly curved for ergonomic comfort, and the upholstery shows a subtle marbled pattern. The chair is supported by four slender, slightly splayed metal legs, which appear to be made of steel with a dark, possibly rusted or aged finish. The overall design is minimalist, with no armrests and a focus on functional simplicity. This chair would be suitable for use in urban environments such as waiting areas, cafes, or community centers.
description: A vintage tan upholstered chair with a marbled pattern, padded seat and backrest, and four slender metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the padded seat and backrest, with all four metal legs visible and the marbled upholstery pattern prominent.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the curved backrest and the angled positioning of the legs, with the back upholstery texture visible.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizing the full height and width of the backrest, as well as the splayed arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view showing the seat depth, the curvature of the backrest, and the marbled pattern on both seat and back.
